name: FD Portfolio
description: Personal fixed deposit portfolio dashboard for Indian banks

changelog.notes: Fix onboarding — browser password managers no longer overlay "Use Suggested Password" on the Confirm PIN field, so you can type your chosen PIN normally.

Sync all user data via Drive — settings, API key, and your PIN-wrapped master key now live in Drive's appDataFolder alongside your FDs. Sign in on a new device and it drops straight to the Lock Screen: your existing PIN unlocks everything, no re-setup. New 4-step onboarding prefills your name and email from Google. You'll be asked to re-consent once for the new profile scopes.

Face ID fast-unlock via WebAuthn PRF — enroll once in Settings and Face ID alone unlocks the app without a PIN each session (PIN stays as backup). Master-key crypto refactor with automatic migration; no re-setup needed.

Move primary data store to Drive appDataFolder — atomic whole-file writes (no more clear-then-write race) and free revision history; Google Sheet becomes an optional one-way export. You'll be asked to re-consent once for the new Drive scope.
Harden security (encrypted storage, persistent token, write queue, forced PIN, sign-out) and polish iOS safe-area in Settings header and bottom nav
Add FD number/name/account number fields, bank dropdown filter, home count widgets, and archived checkbox filter
Add security hardening — encrypted localStorage, PBKDF2 PIN hashing, CSP headers, robust lock screen
Fix iOS safe area — header and bottom nav respect notch/Dynamic Island
Edit/archive/delete deposits, B&W document scanner, card layout refresh
Add inactivity lock screen with Face ID and PIN unlock after 1 min
Improve receipt OCR — higher resolution, cross-validation for rotated receipts and Indian amounts
Add profile settings sidebar with fixed Save button
Fix PWA paths for subpath deployment
Initial release — responsive dashboard, receipt OCR, Google Sheets sync, offline PWA
